snp5.9:1.4: when anyone explained ‘It is,’ ‘It will be,’
snp5.9:1.5: all that was hearsay, quotation marks.
snp5.9:2.1: Now, sage, teach me the Dhamma
snp5.9:2.4:
one would cross over beyond entanglement in the world.
The Buddha:
snp5.9:3.2: with regard to things dear —seen, heard, sensed, & cognized— there is:
snp5.9:3.4: the unfallen, undying state of unbinding.
snp5.9:4.4: have crossed over beyond entanglement in the world.
